response.justification: Bogdan has over 12 years of full-stack experience with strong alignment to the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Docker) and deep exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, cloud platforms (AWS), testing (Vitest/Jest), and architecture — plus proven ownership of open-source tools and cross-stack problem solving. His background in internal tooling, automation, and developer infrastructure directly matches the role’s focus on enterprise tooling.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and Docker across multiple enterprises
Proven expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, including MCP code generators
Strong track record in building internal tools, open-source platforms, and CI/CD infrastructure
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume — though Node.js/TypeScript/testing experience is strong
German language skill is only basic, which may impact collaboration in Berlin-based teams
Some roles (e.g., DLang-heavy) may suggest over-diversification, though recent work aligns well with target stack
